text: IDF BEQAA VALLEY STRIKES: First airstrikes in Beqaa Valley in 3 weeks — targeting Hezbollah weapons depots and rocket launch sites. Significant escalation after ceasefire violations accelerated. IDF also found weapons cache (RPGs, Kalashnikovs, grenades, explosives) hidden in children's bedroom in Aadshit al-Qusayr. Ceasefire near total collapse.
verificationNote: Times of Israel liveblog, JNS, JPost. All verified.

text: IRAN CONTRADICTS OWN PROPOSAL: Deputy Parliament Speaker Ali Nikzad declares Hormuz 'will under no circumstances' return to pre-war state — cites direct order from Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei. This directly contradicts Iran's simultaneous Hormuz reopening proposal sent via Pakistan. Suggests deep internal split or dual-track strategy.
verificationNote: Life News Agency, Kaieteur News, CNN Business. Confirmed.

text: KHAMENEI DEAD? 'Martyrs of the Epic Struggle' mural in Mashhad depicts Mojtaba Khamenei alongside Soleimani, Raisi, and Ruhollah Khomeini — all confirmed dead. No video or audio of him since Feb 28. Cardboard cutout at introduction. First address read by news anchor. 59 days without proof of life is unprecedented for Iran's Supreme Leader.
verificationNote: Euronews, The Week, WION. Mural confirmed; death speculation unverified.

text: GOLDMAN SACHS RAISES FORECAST: Q4 2026 Brent forecast hiked to $90/bbl (from $80), WTI to $83 (from $75). Estimates 14.5M bpd Middle East output lost, 9.6M bpd global deficit in Q2 2026 (from 1.8M bpd surplus). 11-12M bpd inventory draw in April (record). Brent now $108.11 on Nikzad statement. Energy Sec Wright: gas won't drop below $3 until 2027.
verificationNote: Bloomberg, Invezz, The Hill. All verified.

text: CEASEFIRE STATUS: Lebanese Minister Shehadi tells Euronews truce is 'not holding' — both sides returning to 'pre-ceasefire modus operandi.' Hezbollah vows 'legitimate response' to Israeli violations, claims 500+ Israeli breaches. Netanyahu: Hezbollah 'dismantling the ceasefire.' White House spokesperson Wales: 'US holds the cards.' Trump NSC meeting Monday on Iran proposal.
verificationNote: Euronews, Press TV, Free Malaysia Today. All verified.

text: DAY 59 EARLY AM PT ROUNDUP: IDF strikes Beqaa Valley (first in 3 weeks). Houthis hit Andromeda Star (3 ASBMs). Nikzad: Hormuz 'under no circumstances' returns. Khamenei 'martyr' mural. Goldman raises Q4 Brent to $90. Brent $108.11 (+35.4%). WTI $96.50. Gas $4.09 AAA weekly (+30.3%). Iran Hormuz proposal awaiting WH. Trump NSC Monday. War Powers May 1 — 4 days.
verificationNote: Times of Israel, Seatrade Maritime, Life News Agency, Euronews, Bloomberg, AAA. All verified.

text: LEBANON ESCALATION: IDF strike package on 7 southern Lebanon towns Apr 27 killed 14 (incl. 2 women, 2 children) and wounded 37 per Lebanese Health Ministry. Open-source SAR imagery confirms strike geolocation across Kfar Tebnit, Zawtar al-Sharqiya, Nabatieh al-Fawqa, Arnoun, Meidoun. Secondary explosions consistent with rocket-propellant cook-off — IDF used precision SDB-class munitions. Calibrated signal rather than full re-entry into kinetic phase.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, Times of Israel, Lebanese Health Ministry. Confirmed.

text: HORMUZ TRACKER UPDATE: Bloomberg's tracker shows ship transits down to ~7 in past 24h vs 140/day pre-war (95% reduction). 38 vessels now redirected by US Navy since blockade Apr 13. ~4M barrels Iranian oil cleared US blockade Apr 24 via shadow fleet; 6 Iranian tankers (10.5M bbl) returned to port. MSC Francesca and Epaminondas remain in IRGC custody — Day 5.
verificationNote: Bloomberg, Insurance Journal, Al Jazeera. Confirmed.

text: ARAGHCHI-PUTIN ST PETERSBURG: Iranian FM Araghchi met Putin and Lavrov in St. Petersburg Apr 27 — diplomatic pivot to Russian mediation following Trump's cancellation of US envoy trip Apr 26. Araghchi denies Pakistan-mediated Hormuz-for-nuclear-delay arrangement reported by Axios. Diplomatic source familiar with Bern channel says US-Iran message via Switzerland focused narrowly on mine-sweeping deconfliction, NOT broader nuclear talks.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera liveblog, Tasnim, Moscow Times. Confirmed.

text: TRIPLE-CARRIER CENTCOM: 3 US carriers operating concurrently in CENTCOM AOR Apr 27 — USS Abraham Lincoln (Arabian Sea), USS Gerald R. Ford (Red Sea), USS George H.W. Bush (Indian Ocean, arrived Apr 23 from Norfolk). 200+ aircraft, 15,000 personnel, 12 supporting ships — first such concentration since 2003 Iraq invasion. Hegseth (X): 38 ships redirected, Avenger-class minesweepers operating around the clock.
verificationNote: Breaking Defense, Stars and Stripes, Bloomberg. Confirmed.

text: GOLDMAN Q4 FORECAST: Goldman Sachs Q4 Brent forecast at $90 (raised from $80) implies Hormuz disruption persists at least 4-5 more months. Brent $108.11 (+35.4%) sustains plateau on Iranian deputy speaker Nikzad's declaration. Soybeans the standout grain mover (+14.6% vs pre-war) on supply-chain risk; sugar/coffee bearish despite war on Brazil/Argentina output. Pezeshkian called Goldman forecasts 'psychological warfare.'

DAY 59 MIDDAY PT ROUNDUP: IDF strikes 7 southern Lebanon towns kill 14, wound 37 — forced evacuations. 3 US carriers concurrent in CENTCOM (first since 2003). Bloomberg Hormuz: transits down 95% (~7/24h vs 140 pre-war). Araghchi meets Putin in St. Petersburg — Russian mediation pivot. Trump 4-day Iran ultimatum on Truth Social. Khamenei written statement reaffirms Hormuz 'closed by sovereign right.' Brent $108.11. WTI $96.49. Gas $4.09 AAA. Hormuz Day 56. War Powers May 1 — 4 days.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, Times of Israel, Bloomberg, Breaking Defense, Tasnim. All verified.

text: BREAKING: Iran's Hormuz reopening proposal REJECTED by Rubio. He insists any deal must address nuclear program. Trump reviewed with NSC but reportedly 'unhappy' — said Iran 'offered a lot, but not enough.' Diplomacy stalled again. Brent surging to $110+.
verificationNote: CNBC, Foreign Policy, Times of Israel. Confirmed.

text: SECOND Hezbollah drone strike wounds IDF soldiers in southern Lebanon buffer zone — 1 severely, 1 lightly. Follows killing of Sgt. Idan Fooks (19) on Apr 26. Hezbollah now 100+ rockets since ceasefire, ~10,000 projectiles since Feb 28. Netanyahu: Hezbollah 'dismantling the ceasefire.'
verificationNote: Times of Israel liveblog, Haaretz, Euronews. All confirmed.

text: German Chancellor Merz publicly says US 'being humiliated' by Iran — 'clearly stronger than one thought.' Deepest transatlantic rift of the war. Meanwhile Guterres appeals: 'Open the Strait. No tolls. No discrimination.' Warns of global food emergency — 1/3 of fertilizer trade transits Hormuz.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, The Hill, Bloomberg (Merz). UN News, Deccan Chronicle (Guterres). Confirmed.

text: MARKETS DAY 60: Brent $110.44 (+38.3% from pre-war $79.84). WTI $97.32 (+28.9%). IEA calls it 'largest energy supply disruption in history' — 10.1 mb/d plunge. EIA: Brent spot-futures spread at RECORD $25+ (extreme backwardation). Goldman Q4 Brent at $90 (raised from $80). S&P 500 at record highs despite war — AI/tech decoupled.
verificationNote: Trading Economics, IEA, EIA, Benzinga/Goldman, CNBC. All confirmed.

text: WAR POWERS UPDATE: Senate Republicans defeated Iran War Powers resolution for 5TH time on Apr 23 (46-51). Only Rand Paul (R) crossed. Fetterman (D) voted against. May 1 deadline in 3 days. Veterans anti-war protest on Capitol Hill — 62 arrested at Cannon House Office Building incl. disabled activists.
verificationNote: Democracy Now, Time, Foreign Policy, OPB. Confirmed.

text: DAY 60 LATE PM PT ROUNDUP: Iran Hormuz offer REJECTED by Rubio. Trump 'unhappy.' Brent $110.44 (+38.3%). WTI $97.32. Gas ~$4.06 AAA. Guterres: 'Open the Strait.' Merz: US 'humiliated.' 2nd Hezbollah drone wounds IDF. Pezeshkian: 'will not negotiate under pressure.' Qassem rejects direct talks. War Powers 5th defeat. Veterans 62 arrested. Hormuz Day 57. May 1 (3 days).
verificationNote: CNBC, UN News, Al Jazeera, Trading Economics, Democracy Now. All verified.
